hero_subtitle: SFTY unifies fragmented screening outputs into structured risk profiles and case workflows to streamline escalation and preserve audit-ready evidence for digital asset compliance teams.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling

trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Screening slows when data stays siloed
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to connect sanctions, PEP and adverse media data with risk profiles and case workflows. This separation leads to manual reconciliation, inconsistent escalation and weak audit evidence across screening channels.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates sanctions, PEP and adverse media screening outputs with risk profiles, case management and escalation workflows to create a unified, auditable compliance operating layer for VASP teams.
workflow_title: From screening data to case escalation
workflow_description: SFTY links fragmented screening outputs with customer risk profiles then routes alerts into cases, decisions and audit evidence for consistent compliance review.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented checks. Structured escalation control
why_sfty_description: SFTY consolidates screening data silos by connecting provider outputs into risk profiles, case escalation workflows and audit-ready evidence for clearer operational control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY helps VASP operations unify fragmented screening data with risk profiles, preserving audit evidence and supporting secure workflows for scalable bank due diligence and deployment.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: How does SFTY connect fragmented screening data?
faq_1_answer: SFTY consolidates fragmented screening outputs into connected risk profiles, enabling structured escalation and consistent review workflows within one operational compliance layer.
faq_2_question: How are compliance cases handled in SFTY?
faq_2_answer: SFTY creates structured cases from screening alerts, routes them based on rules, records reviewer actions, and links evidence and decisions for efficient compliance operations.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting evidence within its workflow, supporting audit-ready records for internal reviews and regulatory inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing screening tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with existing KYC, KYB, KYT and screening providers by bringing their outputs into a single compliance orchestration platform without disrupting current systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace our current screening providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace screening providers but works above them to connect outputs into structured workflows, cases and audit evidence.
final_title: Connect screening data into structured case workflows
final_description: Explore how SFTY connects screening outputs into risk profiles, escalation paths and audit-ready evidence for VASP compliance teams.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
